problem id: 17fd9612
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00110111 -> 10001011
  10101001 -> 01000100
  01011010 -> 00001101
  10001000 -> 01000100
  01011100 -> 00101110
  11110010 -> 01011001
  10100000 -> 01010000
  00011110 -> 00001111
  00001111 -> 00000111

query: 00110100
predicted answer: 00011010
